.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fafafa 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fafafa, color-mix(in srgb, #fafafa 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fafafa 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fafafa, color-mix(in srgb, #fafafa 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(21, 146, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(234, 234, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
